nasb.text: Then Joseph brought his father Jacob and presented him to Pharaoh; and Jacob blessed Pharaoh.

esv.text: Then Joseph brought in Jacob his father and stood him before Pharaoh, and Jacob blessed Pharaoh.

cnv.text: 約瑟把他父親雅各帶到法老面前，雅各就給法老祝福。

ccb.text: 约瑟又带父亲雅各去见法老，雅各就为法老祝福。

csbs.text: 约瑟又把他父亲雅各带进来，让他站在法老面前，雅各就为法老祝福。
